stories.headline: Four central banks set rates this week as BTC gets rejected below $80K
stories.tldr: BOJ, Fed, ECB and BOE all decide policy this week, putting Bitcoin's stalled $80K breakout at the mercy of a synchronized macro print.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A simultaneous dovish or hawkish surprise from four G10 central banks would amplify dollar moves and decide whether crypto's April rebound holds or rolls over.
the_details: BTC opened at $77,368 Tuesday and slid to $76,472 by 7:10 a.m. ET, down 1.6% on the day after a third straight $78K open.
ETH fell 2.8% to $2,278 as risk appetite cooled into the FOMC, the third Fed meeting of 2026.
BTC and the dollar are moving in near-perfect opposition — the most extreme negative correlation in nearly four years.

stories.headline: Aave rallies DeFi partners to contain $292M Kelp DAO contagion
stories.tldr: Aave is coordinating a multi-protocol bailout effort to backstop wrapped ether stranded across 20 chains after the Kelp DAO drain.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: How DeFi mutualizes losses here will set the playbook for cross-chain LRT contagion — and decide whether AAVE depositors keep withdrawing.
the_details: Attacker drained 116,500 rsETH (~$292M, ~18% of supply) by exploiting Kelp's LayerZero-powered bridge, forcing an emergency contract pause.
DeFi TVL collapsed from $26.4B on April 18 to ~$20B by Sunday morning per DefiLlama as panic withdrawals hit lending markets.
AAVE token sank more than 18% on the weekend before stabilizing as the coordinated response took shape.

stories.headline: Solana ETF inflows collapse 92% to $34M as altcoin rotation stalls
stories.tldr: US spot Solana ETFs pulled just $34M in April versus $419M in November 2025 as BTC dominance and altseason indices flash early-cycle.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: The 92% drop is the cleanest tape signal yet that institutional altcoin demand has dried up — pressuring SOL near $86 and capping any near-term rotation.
the_details: Spot SOL ETF April inflows: $34M vs. $419M peak in November 2025, per industry tracking.
BTC dominance sits at 58.1% with the altseason index at 33–38/100 — historically a pre-rotation regime.
SOL trades $85.97 on Binance; AVAX stuck below $10 despite the first U.S. AVAX staking ETF launch.

stories.headline: April 2026 is now crypto's worst hack month since February 2025 — $606M gone
stories.tldr: Twelve incidents have drained $606M in the first 18 days of April, with Drift Protocol and Kelp DAO accounting for the bulk of the damage.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Two nine-figure exploits in 19 days reset insurance pricing, throttle bridge volumes, and hand regulators a fresh stick on DeFi market structure.
the_details: Drift Protocol exploit on April 1 lifted $285M; investigators suspect DPRK-linked actors using pre-signed authorizations.
CoW Swap reported a $1.2M loss on April 14 from a domain hijacking attack on its frontend.
Vercel breach on April 20 forced crypto teams across the stack to rotate API keys and audit deployment secrets.

stories.headline: TOKEN2049 Dubai postponed to 2027 over heightened UAE security risks
stories.tldr: Organizers pulled TOKEN2049 Dubai from the 2026 calendar, citing security concerns tied to the regional fallout from the Iran conflict.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Losing the Gulf's flagship crypto event removes a key Q2 catalyst and signals Middle East geopolitics are now bleeding directly into crypto's deal-flow calendar.
the_details: Brent crude is trading above $104 with the Strait of Hormuz still closed amid stalled US–Iran negotiations.
TOKEN2049 Dubai is one of the largest crypto conferences globally and typically anchors Q2 launches and fundraises.
Sponsors and exhibitors will need to redeploy budgets to Singapore, EthCC or smaller regional events to fill the gap.
